assessment.overall_summary: Credible public-source regulatory concerns were identified and should be reviewed by compliance before onboarding proceeds.
assessment.coverage_notes: Open-web coverage is sufficient for initial review but specialist subscription databases were not searched.
assessment.disposition_rationale: At least one medium-to-high support adverse finding was identified in a material category.

triggered_rules: CASE_MEDIUM_01: at least one medium_or_high_support finding in a material category
CASE_ESCALATE_01: regulatory finding requires manual compliance review

evidence.title: Customs authorities review shipping paperwork at Orion-linked entity
evidence.snippet: Authorities were reported to be reviewing inconsistencies in trade documentation at an Orion-linked operating unit.

rubric_assessment.justification: The entity match is strong due to exact entity naming and jurisdiction alignment. The source is an established trade publication, and the issue is material to trade-finance risk.
